name: Apricot Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, shortening, and egg until fluffy.
2. Stir in the apricot nectar and orange rind.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and add to the creamed mixture.
4. Blend in the dried chopped apricots and nuts (if using) and fold into the batter.
5. Pour the batter into muffin tins sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Let stand for 20 minutes before baking at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until done.
7. Cool on racks.
